emails.body: 5/1 Checkout BLOOMBERG Chris Mallory deal 598166 mw should be 50 not 25 per Bloomberg AMEREX WEST Chris Mallory dela 598640 Amerex does not recognize PREBON WEST Dianna Missing this deal: Enron sells to Powerex 50 mw MidC light at $150 for 5/2
